stories.title: The review began remembering how you read.
stories.brief: The first reader workflow persisted edition, project, attention, and understanding choices so a weekly review could become a habit instead of a disposable report.
stories.whatChanged: Edition selection and per-story reading choices moved into local state, with hydration before the interface began saving updates.
stories.whyItMatters: A useful review should remember where the reader stopped and what they already understood. Persistence made the interface cumulative before any account service existed.
stories.verify: Change edition and story state, reload the page, and confirm those choices return without a network request.
stories.tradeoff: The state lived only in one browser, so it established the interaction model without yet providing cross-device continuity.
stories.evidence: 1 feature commit · durable edition and story preferences

codeEvidence.title: Hydrate the reader before saving again
codeEvidence.why: The effect restores story, view, filter, and edition choices first, then marks hydration complete so initial defaults cannot overwrite the reader's last session.
